allow: Bash(echo "--- total tsc errors: $\(npm run typecheck 2>&1)

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('version:', p.version\); console.log\('react-scripts:', p.dependencies['react-scripts']||p.devDependencies&&p.devDependencies['react-scripts']\); console.log\('vite:', \(p.devDependencies&&p.devDependencies.vite\)||p.dependencies.vite\)")
